reason: The measured dense_gemm_16x8_k1_p1 tile remains the selected compute anchor after measured local datapath, softmax, FIFO, and router overhead are charged. The 1200 mm2 / 40% logic point reaches 132480 MAC/cycle and 1758.156307 us, but cross-tile reduction and analytic SRAM/global NoC service are now the relevant residual abstractions.
next_action: Evaluate detailed SRAM/global NoC and cross-tile reduction scheduling for the selected dense-tile frontier candidates.
